name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. Session 1 (Exploratory 8T) + Session 2 (Offensive 8T) with Final Statements. Session 2 receives Session 1 conclusions as briefing. Extended Thinking conditional between sessions. Dynamic Data Filters (1 Haiku per log volume). Observer removed (reserved for CPAS ideal/Claude Code). Log management moved to cpas-manager plugin.
